World state of isolation and survival pressure

danger_signals.meaning: High fragility; danger is pervasive and lethal

safety_signals.meaning: Temporary invulnerability state; player gains power advantage

safety_signals.meaning: Safe zone; end of survival ordeal

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Presence of rescue ship as allied asset

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Multiple enemy types suggesting organized island ecosystem
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Island interior as creature territory; ownership of Macho Max drug

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Island setting; plane wreckage implied; character separated from civilization
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Amagon forced to traverse island on foot toward rescue objective

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Variety of enemy creatures populating the environment
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Combat-focused gameplay requiring rifle use; high lethality of damage
Transformation into Megagon form grants temporary combat superiority
Megagon hit points scale with Amagon score; damage cost for chest-wave attacks

environmental_storytelling.example: Rescue ship location on opposite side of island communicates survival journey distance and challenge
Variety of hostile enemies suggests Monster Island has established ecosystem with territorial creatures
Plane crash establishes why protagonist is stranded and what separates him from rescue
Macho Max drug (Japanese version) establishes scientific/supernatural element to world; Mega-Key pickup signals transformation mechanic visually

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Uses rifle for ranged combat; single-hit lethality forces cautious engagement
Switches to melee punch attacks (8x damage); uses chest-wave energy blast at health cost (16x damage); cannot use rifle
Actively oppose player progression; variety suggests different attack patterns and threat levels

notes: Amagon communicates world-state primarily through survival mechanics and enemy presence. The crash-landing premise establishes isolation danger. The single-hit vulnerability in normal form visually reinforces precarious survival state. Transformation into Megagon via Mega-Key pickup is the primary power-progression signal, manifesting as visual size increase and behavioral shift from ranged (rifle) to melee (punch/energy waves). The island setting with scattered creatures communicates an organized hostile environment. Japanese version includes narrative element (scientist, Macho Max drug) suggesting supernatural/scientific power source for transformation. Minimal documented faction visual markers; enemy identity relies on creature design variety rather than symbolic identity.
